{{Quote|Heavy losses sustained in the ongoing assault of U'Dray have put us understrength. We are receiving a replacement complement of new TIE pilots from the training squadron of the ''Victorious''.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tomax Bren/Legends|Tomax Bren]], in a [[datamemo]] to the [[Scimitar assault wing]]'s [[Squadron Leader/Legends|squadron leaders]]|<ref name="ISB" />}}
'''''Victorious''''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] that served as [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Qeimet fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] forces carried aboard ''Victorious'' included a [[Unidentified training squadron|training squadron]]. In the later stages of their training aboard ''Victorious'', these trainees were deployed as [[TIE series/Legends|TIE fighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] in actual combat conditions. Although normally expected to remain in reserve, they were sometimes pressed into direct combat with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] starfighters.<ref name="ISB" />

During the [[assault of U'Dray]], heavy losses sustained by the [[Scimitar assault wing]] forced them to accept replacement pilots from the training squadron of the ''Victorious''. These pilots were to complete their [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] training in live combat, but had not undergone full wing indoctrination. As such, the commander of the Scimitar assault wing, [[Tomax Bren/Legends|Tomax Bren]], issued a [[datamemo]] to his squadron commanders reminding them to drill crucial information into the new pilots.<ref name="ISB" />
